index.title: マルチプロセス化の実装手順

content.text: Added `DataReader`, `SqlRow`, and `ExecutionContext` to the s1 hints array. These are Nablarch framework types used in the `createReader` method signature (`public DataReader<SqlRow> createReader(ExecutionContext context)`).
